repair_description: Added 3 missing paths to allowed_paths in the original work packet's scope envelope: column_registry.yml, docs/schema/, src/sys/lcs/doctrine/. This resolves the RULE-002 (file_target_containment) violation where column_registry.yml was modified during the build but was not in the declared scope.

modified.description: Added column_registry.yml, docs/schema/, src/sys/lcs/doctrine/ to allowed_paths array.
